item.descr: Workaround Comcast CGM4981COM bridge-mode slowdown (gateway ARP/memory-leak); see homelab-command-center 2026-06-15 session log

git.privkey: -----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY----- b3BlbnNzaC1rZXktdjEAAAAABG5vbmUAAAAEbm9uZQAAAAAAAAABAAAAMwAAAAtzc2gtZW QyNTUxOQAAACDpyvvGZZD6peFj4uHhU5gdL1L+6v3p/xER8YshZu0wNQAAAKCUhAf6lIQH +gAAAAtzc2gtZWQyNTUxOQAAACDpyvvGZZD6peFj4uHhU5gdL1L+6v3p/xER8YshZu0wNQ AAAEBjDUZWml2gBJeXhQ0m8nybYaOYgYH9KORoUyhnOhY73+nK+8ZlkPql4WPi4eFTmB0v Uv7q/en/ERHxiyFm7TA1AAAAGW9wbnNlbnNlLWdpdGJhY2t1cC1kZXBsb3kBAgME -----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----

hosts.descr: netservices VM (edge) - Omada controller, LOAD-BEARING, never move

rule.descr: Redirect LAN DNS to Unbound (encrypted egress enforcement) - UPDATE TARGET AT PHASE B RE-IP
Backstop: block cleartext DNS egress (Unbound uses DoT :853)
Default allow LAN to any rule
Default allow LAN IPv6 to any rule

alias.name: bl_spamhaus_drop
alias.description: Spamhaus DROP (EDROP merged into DROP since 2024)

alias.name: bl_firehol_level1
alias.description: FireHOL Level 1 - contains RFC1918, WAN-inbound use ONLY

alias.name: bl_abusech_feodo
alias.description: abuse.ch Feodo Tracker botnet C2 (recommended list)

host.description: edge Proxmox host (shadows public A record to .50; retire that record at edge-1 review)
